snippet.title: Oasis - Wonderwall (Sub. Español + Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Oasis - Wonderwall (Letra En Español / Lyrics)
Released 01/10/1995

Una playlist con las mejores canciones: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLMeB5cnHcQcq0dfPIcXINK1w0fIi-5mld&si=UjpTQP_lJWCi8DNO

#Oasis #Wonderwall #Lyrics #England #WolrdCup #JudeBellingham #Bellingham 

—

¡Muchísimas gracias por ver mi video, un abrazo a la distancia 🫂!

¡Encuéntrame en otras redes!
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/user/qbv420v1r19afqa6y3oxk0sjf?si=d48283bd97384444
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/swext.blue/
TikTok: https://vm.tiktok.com/ZMeRhv2d7/
Correo de contacto: swextblue@gmail.com

🎤 Lyrics: 
today is gonna be the day
that they're gonna throw it back to you
by now, you should've somehow
realized what you gotta do
i don't believe that anybody
feels the way i do about you now

backbeat, the word is on the street
that the fire in your heart is out
i'm sure you've heard it all before
but you never really had a doubt
i don't believe that anybody
feels the way i do about you now

and all the roads
we have to walk are winding
and all the lights
that lead us there are blinding

there are many things that i'd
like to say to you
but i don't know how

because maybe
you're gonna be the one that saves me
and after all
you're my wonderwall

today was gonna be the day
but they'll never throw it back to you
by now, you should've somehow
realized what you're not to do
i don't believe that anybody
feels the way i do about you now

and all the roads
that lead you there were winding
and all the lights
that light the way are blinding

there are many things that i'd
like to say to you
but i don't know how

i said maybe
you're gonna be the one that saves me
and after all
you're my wonderwall

i said maybe (i said maybe)
you're gonna be the one that saves me
and after all
you're my wonderwall

i said maybe (i said maybe)
you're gonna be the one that saves me
(that saves me)
you're gonna be the one that saves me
(that saves me)
you're gonna be the one that saves me
(that saves me)

—

📌 Tags:

snippet.title: House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episode 4 Trailer Breakdown & Easter Eggs
snippet.description:
House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episode 4 Trailer. Aemond & Alys Rivers at Harrenhal. Alys Rivers vs Criston Cole, Ormund Hightower's master plan for the dragonseeds, Aegon & Sunfyre. Rhaenyra, Alicent & House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episode 5 ► https://bit.ly/AwesomeSubscribe
House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episode 3 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bLhvx3ssemI&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxGuSDE8NtOuthqbKFChC0q&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC

Avengers Doomsday CinemaCon Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dDrWFxkhCuA&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwWT3yd94Xc6n-ooI85uV_u&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
Lanterns Trailer https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kPkbV4TVQ3A&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczwCLH9RIm-7ui56ameRYmdQ&index=1&pp=iAQBsAgC
Emergency Awesome New Videos https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FeOfhzu7ZdY&list=PLOIeYdZ3QczxQXxyV_2D8kuEs_QsuQIyJ&index=7

Covering House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episode 4 Trailer Breakdown and Easter Eggs. Ormund Hightower takes Tumbleton, Alys Rivers and Aemond at Harrenhal with Vhagar, Criston Cole vs Alys Rivers. Rhaenyra vs Alicent Scenes. Rhaenyra Iron Throne. Ormund Hightower's plan to steal the Dragonseeds Hugh Hammer Vermithor. House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episode 5 Footage. Aegon and Sunfyre at Rooks Rest.

House Stark, Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms Connection to Dunk and Egg. The Isle of Faces, God's Eye, Green Men, Daemon & Rhaenyra Arc, Daeron Targaryen, Ormund Hightower, Cregan Stark, Roderick Dustin and the Stark Army Winter Wolves. Black Alys Alysanne Blackwood. Daemon & Rhaenyra. The Fall of King's Landing, Battle Of The Gullet, other major battles. Aemond at Harrenhal. Daemon vs Aemond, The Gods Eye, Helaena Dragon Dreams, Daemon Visions, Three Eyed Raven. The Fake Daeron Targaryen Explained.

Why Alys Rivers wants Aemond. House Of The Dragon Season 2 Episode 8 Finale Aftermath and Ending Explained. Daemon Sees Daenerys Targaryen, all of Daemon's Weirwood Visions. The Three Eyed Raven Brynden Rivers, The Bloodraven. Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms Trailer connection. House Of The Dragon Season 3 Teaser. Rhaenyra on the Iron Throne. Helaena Dragon Dreams upgrade.

New History and Lore, Vermithor, Silverwing, Dragonseeds, Hugh Hammer, Ulf White, Seasmoke Addam Hull, Sheepstealer, Daeron Tessarion. Alys Rivers. Why Daemon and Rhaenyra Take King's Landing, Fall of King's Landing. How they trick Aemond and Vhagar.

Riverlands Battle, House Stark Returns, Cregan Stark Easter Eggs. House Tully. House Of The Dragon Season 3 Episodes. Vermithor, Arrax Lucerys Dragon, Moondancer Baela, Rhaena Sheepstealer, Aegon II Sunfyre, Helaena Targaryen Dreamfyre. Helaena Targaryen Dragon Dreams and how she tells the future. Aegon The Conqueror and Valyria Explained. Daemon Targaryen and Vermithor Explained. Dance of The Dragons Trailer and A Song of Ice And Fire Book Easter Eggs. Jon Snow Daenerys Targaryen Family History and Lore.

More House of the Dragon Season 3 and Knight Of The Seven Kingdoms  Season 2 videos soon. And the Aegon's Conquest Movie!

snippet.title: Ve Junoon | Awarapan 2 | Emraan Hashmi, Disha Patani | Vishesh Bhatt | Mithoon, Sayeed Q., Subodhh
snippet.description:
Phir ishq karne chala kyun?
 
Beginning the musical journey of ‘Awarapan 2’, ‘Ve Junoon’ is composed by Mithoon, sung by Subodhh Sharma and penned by Sayeed Quadri. Featuring Emraan Hashmi and Disha Patani in the video, this song is yearning in its purest form.
 
#VeJunoon #Awarapan2 #EmraanHashmi #DishaPatani #Mithoon #SayeedQuadri #SubodhhSharma
 
Song Composed and Arranged by Mithoon
Lyrics: Sayeed Quadri
Singer: Subodhh Sharma
Song Creative Head: Anugrah
Music Production: Godswill Mergulhão
Music Assistants: Anugrah, Godswill Mergulhão, Eli Rodrigues & Kaushal Gohil
Guitars: Kalyan Baruah
Violin: Jitu Thakur
Backing Vocals: Abhishek Nailwal, Mihir Sharma & Kaustubh More
Recorded at Livingwater Music by A Manivannan
Song Mixed & Mastered by Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay
Assistant Mixing Engineer: Michael Edwin Pillai
Music Head Vishesh Films: Rohit Saini
 
Starring Emraan Hashmi, Disha Patani, Shabana Azmi, Suvinder Vicky, Vijayant Kohli, Aniruddh Rawal, Atul Kumar
 
Vishesh Films & Mukesh Bhatt Present
A Vishesh Bhatt Production
 
AWARAPAN 2
Produced By Vishesh Bhatt
Directed By Nitin Kakkar
Director of Photography Vishnu Rao
Editor Devendra Murdeshwar
Production Designer Teena Paradkar
Choreographer Mudassar Khan
 
Theatrical Distribution Pen Marudhar
In Cinemas 14th August 2026
 
Lyrics:

Intro
 
Chaha tha tune jisse Paaya kabhi na usse
 
Tujhko toh sab hai pataa, aye dil Saari khabar hai tujhe
 
Banjar hui hai aankhen Veeran hai ye saansen
Ab meri rooh ko na jalaa...naa jalaa
 
Aage hai teri marzi Karle tu ye khudgarzi
Hona hai hojaa tabaah...haan tabaah
 
Chorus
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil lutne chalaa kyun
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil mitne chalaa kyun..haaye
 
Phir Ishq karne chalaa kyun OOOOOOOOO..
Dil lutne chalaa kyun OOOOOOOOO..
Dil mitne chalaa kyun..haaye Phir Ishq karne chala kyun…
 
( Music )
 
OOOOOOOOOO.. OOOOOOOOOO..
 
Verse 1
 
Dekha hai pehle kahin Aisa laga kyun usse
 
Shaayad mere dard se kahin Waqif laga woh mujhe
 
Marham laga zakhmon pe Raahat mili kuchh phirse
Dil ko sukoon milaa..haan milaaaa
 
Aage hai teri marzi Karle tu ye khudgarzi
Hona hai hojaa tabaah...haan tabaah
 
Chorus
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil lutne chalaa kyun
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil mitne chalaa kyun, haaye
 
Phir Ishq karne chalaa kyun…
 
(Music)
 
Tararareiyeee yeeeeee…
 
Verse 2
 
Aisi koi daastaan
Hai dil main uske kahin Zikr woh jiska kabhi magar Khud se bhi karta nahin
 
Rakhta chhupa ke sabse Bhulaa hai jaise rakh ke
Kal woh kahin apna…..apnaaa Aage hai teri marzi
 
Karle tu ye khudgarzi
Hona hai hojaa tabaah...haan tabaah
 
Chorus
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil lutne chalaa kyun
 
Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon, Ve Junoon Dil mitne chalaa kyun….haaye
 
Phir ishq karne chalaa kyun
 
Ve Junooooooooooooooo Oooooooooo Oooooooooo Ooooooooooo
Ve Junooooooooooooooo Oooooooooo Oooooooooo Ooooooooooo
 
Dil ishq karne chalaa kyun Hmmmmmm…..
Phir ishq karne chalaa kyun

About YRF Spy Universe: 
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, released on 3 July 2026.

snippet.title: Tom Holland Reacts to Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey Trailer
snippet.description:
Join this channel to get early access to episodes, ad-free watching, and priority access to our live events:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCUYK0BJZF3yNb2fw1EdAXUQ/join

Tom Holland reacts to the trailers for Christopher Nolan’s The Odyssey, unpacking the myth, history, and symbolism behind Homer’s great epic. From the fall of Troy and the Trojan Horse to Odysseus’s desperate journey home to Ithaca, Tom explores why this ancient story is such a perfect fit for Nolan’s fascination with time, memory, fate, and fractured narratives. He also looks at the film’s major characters, including Penelope, Telemachus, Athena, Antinous, Agamemnon, and the Cyclops Polyphemus, while explaining what each reveals about the world of the Odyssey. With its IMAX scale, mythic action, and one of the greatest stories ever told, Nolan’s adaptation could be one of the cinematic events of the year.

Book your tickets to Christopher Nolan’s the Odyssey, in cinemas July 17th. In partnership with NBCUniversal.

snippet.title: ASSASSIN'S CREED BLACK FLAG RESYNCED Walkthrough Gameplay Part 1 - INTRO (FULL GAME)
snippet.description:
Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Walkthrough Gameplay Part 1 includes a Full Game Review and Full Gameplay on PlayStation 5 Pro (PS5 Pro), Xbox Series X/S and PC (Steam, Ubisoft Connect). snippet.description:
In a distant future following a nuclear catastrophe, the West Balkans have become a lawless wasteland where the most valuable currency is the bullet. A mysterious blind fiddler wanders the ruins, singing the legend of the "Grain People"—a peaceful community of wheat-growers who refuse to submit to a distant city's tyranny. When a young warrior’s family is slaughtered by a deranged warlord, he embarks on a bloody quest for vengeance. Armed only with a blade and a motorcycle, he must navigate radioactive cults and hallucinations to protect the last remnants of civilization.
